Official.linkContent: You can use an ‘official’ {{ types }} in every product phase. It's fully accessible, and will be supported and maintained in the long term.

To be reviewed.link: How to use ‘to be reviewed’ {{ types }}
To be reviewed.linkContent: You can use a ‘to be reviewed’ {{ types }} in every product phase. However, there may be issues with it as it has not been reviewed or developed recently.

Experimental.linkContent: You can use an ‘experimental’ {{ type }} in alpha and beta phases, as an idea, or starting point.

Archived.linkContent: Do not use an ‘archived’ {{ type }}. It's no longer being supported.
